Petn. Of Inter Vivos Trust To Establish Claim Ownership Over Property
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Continued To Sep-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court noted that this is the second non appearance. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on September 9, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 or the matter will be taken off calendar. The petition to establish claim of ownership, etc., was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petn. Of Inter Vivos Trust To Establish Claim Ownership Over Property
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Continued To Aug-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The petition of inter vivos trust to establish claim ownership over property was continued to August 5, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The clerk will contact counsel.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
